channel.title: Twitter Timeline RSS
channel.description: 你的 Twitter Following Timeline（via opencli）

item.title: NEVER REMOVE YOUR 2FA NEVER REMOVE YOUR 2FA NEVER REMOVE YOUR 2FA NEVER REMOVE YOUR 2FA NEVER REMOV...
item.description:
NEVER REMOVE YOUR 2FA NEVER REMOVE YOUR 2FA NEVER REMOVE YOUR 2FA NEVER REMOVE YOUR 2FA NEVER REMOVE YOUR 2FA
I repeat: never ever make that mistake
you’ll regret it sooner than you think
--- @binance | ❤️ 28 | 🔁 0 | 💬 9 | 👁 704
item.author: @binance

item.title: also available on the Claude Blog: https://t.co/cS9RhvOPKp
item.author: @trq212

item.title: You can also set your autocompact threshold yourself and effectively lower your context window if yo...
item.description:
You can also set your autocompact threshold yourself and effectively lower your context window if you'd prefer.
For example, 400k context is a good compromise:
CLAUDE_CODE_AUTO_COMPACT_WINDOW=400000 claude
see docs here: https://t.co/NuhBuTSSDt
--- @trq212 | ❤️ 41 | 🔁 4 | 💬 5 | 👁 2666
item.author: @trq212

item.title:
I edited the intro because I realized I buried the lede originally-
The 1M context window is a doub...
item.description:
I edited the intro because I realized I buried the lede originally-
The 1M context window is a double-edged sword. It allows Claude to do more complex tasks but it can also leads to more context pollution if you don't manage your session well.
This is how you do that:
--- @trq212 | ❤️ 119 | 🔁 9 | 💬 18 | 👁 8525
item.author: @trq212
